case_title: EMMETT J. GIURLANI VS. PHILLIP L. CORSELLO

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU FILED BY GIURLANI, EMMETT J. CORSELLO, PHILLIP L.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-22-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GIURLANI, EMMETT J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORSELLO, PHILLIP L. $6,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $134.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,884.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS. FILED BY PHILLIP L. CORSELLO ON NOV-05-2010 - DENIED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHALL PAY THE FULL AMOUNT OF THE JUDGMENT IMMEDIATELY. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GIURLANI, EMMETT J. AS TO DEFENDANT CORSELLO, PHILLIP L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-25-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CORSELLO, PHILLIP L.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAIKE PAYMENTS. THE COURT WILL MAKE ORDERS ON THIS REQUEST AFTER A HEARING. JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHALL APPEAR WITH UPDATED FINANCIAL INFORMATION. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2009 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO PAY JUDGMENT IN INSTALLMENTS (COPY SENT TO THE PLAINTIFF) FILED BY DEFENDANT CORSELLO, PHILLIP L.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS. PER ORDER OF COURT. HEARING SET FOR NOV-05-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
